title: lomatium scabrum var. scabrum
intro: Lomatium scabrum var. scabrum, a plant species in the carrot family, is native to the western United States and is also known as lomatium scabrum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of lomatium scabrum var. scabrum include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as the common cold and flu. Lomatium scabrum var. scabrum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for topical use, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
